title: Wrocław, Lower Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wrocław, Lower Silesian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wrocław is a city in Lower Silesian with a population of 674,132. A beautiful city on the Oder River, known for its stunning Market Square, numerous bridges, colorful tenement houses, and a thriving tech and startup ecosystem.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
